finding_results.notes: Re-threaded Noor's interior processing through the lunch sequence so the meal system, Lena's circuit, Tomas's smile, and Suki's recognition all alter Noor's read of the room instead of leaving the scene in external coverage.

Kept one initial pocket-check beat to establish Marcus's pattern, then varied later stress cues into zipper-fidgeting, jaw tension, and under-desk hand flexing while letting Noor's interpretation sharpen.

summary: Restored close-third pressure in the lunch scene and varied Marcus's withdrawal-adjacent tells so they evolve across the chapter instead of repeating as a single checklist marker.
